---
title: "Contact / References"
page-layout: article
toc: true
---

## Contact Information

::: {.hero-intro}
Thank you for visiting my ePortfolio. I welcome opportunities to connect regarding internships, graduate roles, business analytics, business intelligence, and professional collaboration.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## Please update before publishing

Replace the placeholder details below with your real contact links, email address, and reference information before you publish your site.
:::

| Contact Method | Details |
|---|---|
| Full Name | Abel G N |
| Email | abel.georgenibu2@mail.dcu.ie |
| LinkedIn | https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-linkedin-profile |
| GitHub | https://github.com/your-username |
| Location | Coimbatore, India / Kerala, India |

## Professional summary

I am a graduate in **Business Administration (International Business)** with interests in **data analytics**, **business intelligence**, **reporting**, and **decision support**. I am especially interested in opportunities where I can combine business understanding with analytical tools to contribute to meaningful outcomes.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Areas of interest

- Business Analytics
- Data Visualization
- Business Intelligence
- Reporting and Dashboarding
- Financial and Operational Analysis
:::

## Ways to reach me

You may contact me for:

- graduate and entry-level opportunities
- internships and trainee roles
- project collaboration
- professional networking
- discussions related to analytics and business intelligence

## References

Below is a professional references section you can keep in your portfolio. Replace the sample placeholders with your actual referees.

### Reference 1

::: {.profile-card}
**Name:** Mr./Ms. Reference Name 1  
**Position:** Internship Supervisor / Manager  
**Organization:** Geojit Financial Services Limited  
**Email:** reference1@example.com  
**Phone:** +91-XXXXXXXXXX  
**Relationship:** Supervised me during my internship and can comment on my professionalism, communication, and ability to handle operational and client-support responsibilities.
:::

### Reference 2

::: {.profile-card}
**Name:** Mr./Ms. Reference Name 2  
**Position:** Project Supervisor / Faculty / Team Lead  
**Organization:** Ennovations Techserv Pvt Ltd / Karunya Institute of Technology and Sciences  
**Email:** reference2@example.com  
**Phone:** +91-XXXXXXXXXX  
**Relationship:** Can comment on my reporting skills, teamwork, documentation, and analytical approach in academic or project-based settings.
:::

## Professional values

I aim to present myself as someone who values:

- responsibility
- accuracy
- continuous learning
- teamwork
- professional communication

These values have shaped my academic work, internship experiences, and the way I approach professional development.

## Availability

| Type of Opportunity | Status |
|---|---|
| Internship opportunities | Open |
| Graduate roles | Open |
| Business analytics roles | Open |
| Networking and collaboration | Open |

::: {.callout-important}
## Reference note

Please make sure you have the permission of your referees before publishing their contact details publicly on your website. If needed, you may write: **“References available upon request.”**
:::

## Closing note

Thank you for taking the time to view my portfolio. I am continuing to build my skills in business, analytics, and digital tools, and I look forward to opportunities where I can learn, contribute, and grow professionally.
